title: Two Sum
description: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.
hints: Use a hash map to store seen numbers

title: Binary Search
description: Given a sorted array of integers nums and an integer target, write a function to search target in nums. If target exists, return its index. Otherwise, return -1.

examples.explanation: 9 exists in nums and its index is 4

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

title: 3Sum
description: Given an integer array nums, return all the triplets [nums[i], nums[j], nums[k]] such that i != j, i != k, and j != k, and nums[i] + nums[j] + nums[k] == 0.
hints: Use two pointers for each fixed element

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid.
hints: Match closing brackets with opening ones
